package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for nullable_sql_types_leak_into_api_dto: Response or request DTOs that expose `sql.Null*` types instead of boundary-friendly contract types.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule103NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule103NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule103NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario103Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule103NegativeService, input Rule103NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
